hypothesis: The combination of the Vortex filter and Bollinger Bands with ATR based risk management can help identify short-term direction changes in the KAIAUSDC token's price action, while also incorporating the Family Robusto 'momentum'. Stochastic Oscillator (Stoch) and Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD), as well as the Family Robusto 'momentum', are combined with ATR based stop loss/take profit. The strategy introduces a random behavior to switch between high risk / large positions in volatility and low risk / partial consensus. This is controlled by an anti-fake signal inverse partials filter and gating by volatility.
